name: @bardo-ttrpg/core
description: Local campaign runtime, workspace schema, and grounding logic for Bardo.

scripts.build: tsdown src/workspace.ts src/rules-bootstrap.ts src/campaign-bootstrap.ts src/runtime-tools.ts src/runtime-contracts.ts src/client-adapters.ts --dts
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
